name: Rubber Wood and Stainless Steel Drying Rack - Brightroom™
description:
Pop up an indoor clothesline to make air drying your laundry easier with this Rubber Wood and Stainless Steel Drying Rack from Brightroom™. Featuring a rubberwood and rust-resistant stainless steel construction, this foldable drying rack is easy to open up to add over 32 feet of extra space for hanging and drying clothing. Simply drape your items over the stainless steel bars to air dry, and fold it up for convenient and space-saving storage when you've put your laundry away.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
